title: copier: add Ensure and ConditionalRemove
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind api-change

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add `copier.Ensure()` and `copier.ConditionalRemove()`, for controlling the permissions and datestamps we set on multiple items we create with one call (along with any parents), and selectively removing multiple items with one call.

#### How to verify it

New unit tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
